title: Savar Math Olympiad 2024
description: Join the largest math competition in Savar. Open for classes 6 to 10.
content:
The Savar Math Olympiad 2024 is organized by the Savar Science Society to foster mathematical thinking and competition among students in the region. Participants will face a series of challenging problems that test their logic, problem-solving, and analytical skills.

Date: October 15, 2024
Time: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
Venue: Savar Cantonment Public School

Categories:
- Category A: Class 6-7
- Category B: Class 8-9
- Category C: Class 10
